posts.text:
I think this is well written but the gap between the media and normies on this issue is extremely wide. People just want less ads they don’t think sports betting in general is some horrific vice that will destroy young men.


McKay Coppins (@mckaycoppins)

Last year, The Atlantic gave me $10K to gamble with. What started as a journalistic gimmick turned into something more... unnerving. 

My cover story on the online betting boom warping sports, culture, politics, and the psyches of millions of

posts.text: but it’s aligned more w a class bound/coastal college graduate morality that’s very lightly felt but passionately argued. You can get mad at me and hop around and say ‘BUT WHAT ABOUT THE KIDS’ but really the questions should just be about making the books fair which is boring.

posts.text: We talked with @BharatRamamurti and @AnuraagRoutray about this on the podcast. They propose a lot of very common sense regulations that I think make a lot of sense and dont wander into moralizing. Take a listen. podcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…

posts.text: One thing I’ve noticed is there are some explainer dudes here who seem to hunt down posts where some minority is talking about racism and do a very performative ‘SIGH…WE DONT DO THAT ANYMORE’ or ‘LETS NOT DO 2020 AGAIN…’ listen I promise I hate idpol more than you but shut up.

posts.text: There is still virtue in saying racism is bad. There is also virtue in ignoring silly shit. Some of you are just the most annoying word cops. Don’t say this don’t say that meanwhile all you do is whine and have bad posture and sneer. Terrible life.

civil-rights-race.quote: One thing I’ve noticed is there are some explainer dudes here who seem to hunt down posts where some minority is talking about racism and do a very performative ‘SIGH…WE DONT DO THAT ANYMORE’ or ‘LETS NOT DO 2020 AGAIN…’ listen I promise I hate idpol more than you but shut up.

There is still virtue in saying racism is bad. There is also virtue in ignoring silly shit. Some of you are just the most annoying word cops. Don’t say this don’t say that meanwhile all you do is whine and have bad posture and sneer. Terrible life.
